commands.repair_reason: Draft external PR changes Teams auth/routing/security contracts and needs maintainer architecture review plus real behavior proof before repair or merge automation is appropriate.; Needs attention: The diff changes the MS Teams webhook authentication boundary and moves full token validation behind SDK JSON parsing, so it needs owner/security attention before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve the current Teams JW... (sha=151bb6e16d0afd049bb5c35d2fb7a21c17643529)
commands.review_summary:
The PR migrates the Microsoft Teams plugin from custom Bot Framework adapter/JWT/streaming plumbing to `@microsoft/teams.apps`, rewiring auth, routing, streaming, polls, send/edit/delete paths, tests, and Docker port metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. A high-confidence source reproduction compares PR head with current main and the published `@microsoft/teams.apps@2.0.9` source: the PR routes through SDK auth and send paths that omit current main's validator ordering and stored-reference metadata; no live Teams setup was run.
commands.review_followup: Draft external PR changes Teams auth/routing/security contracts and needs maintainer architecture review plus real behavior proof before repair or merge automation is appropriate.

target.title: fix(msteams): rebase SDK migration onto current main
target.author: heyitsaamir
